operational_knowledge_units.title: Robot States Sorter state groups in Robotics Database
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide lists Robot States Sorter values organized into grouped categories used in the Robotics Database: In and Out, Sorter Queue, Sorter Locations, GLD, and ShutDown.
observed_evidence: Slide title: 'Robotics Database / Robot States Sorter'
Grouped bullets shown under 'In and Out', 'Sorter Queue', 'Sorter Locations', 'GLD', and 'ShutDown'
State values listed as database/reference labels rather than procedural instructions
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Robotics Database Robot States Sorter reference. State groups include In and Out, Sorter Queue, Sorter Locations, GLD, and ShutDown. States listed: MovingToSorterEntranceQueue, AtSorterEntranceQueue, MovingToSorterExitQueue, AtSorterExitQueue, SQMovingIntoZone, SQWaitingInZone, SQStagingExchange, SQStagedExchange, SQExchanging, SQExchanged, SDroppingOffTote, SWaitingInzone, SZoneStaging, SPickingUpTote, SPickedUpTote, SWaitingForExchange, AtGLDPreQueue, MovingToGLDPreQueue, AtGLDPreQueueExit, MovingToShutDownOffTheEnd, AtShutDownOffTheEnd, MovingToShutDownQueue, AtShutDownQueue.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Sorter-related robot movement and waiting states
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The listed robot states describe observable movement, queueing, staging, exchange, tote drop-off, pickup, and waiting conditions around the sorter area.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Robot States Sorter operational behavior. Sorter-related states indicate movement, arrival, queue waiting, zone staging, exchange, tote drop-off, tote pickup, GLD pre-queue handling, and shutdown queue/off-the-end positions. Example implied transitions include MovingToSorterEntranceQueue to AtSorterEntranceQueue and MovingToShutDownQueue to AtShutDownQueue.
